[# ######################################################### # DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE MANUALLY. # Use: versions/#/#/#/documentation/_test_maker/make_tests.py ######################################################### #] <[@ bitty_tag @] data-connect="TestElMethodsElCopytext0010">

NOTE: Computer OS Security settings make the testing of copying something to the clipboard unreliable. You'll need to do it manually instead. Click the button then paste the results into an external document. If you see "Test Text 0010" the test passed.

check manually
